title: Gear Up for Upstart (UPST) Q2 Earnings: Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
text: Wall Street expected Upstart to post a quarterly loss of $0.05 per share for Q2 2022. In May 2022, Upstart's management guided for Q2 revenues of $295-305M, but on July 7, 2022, Upstart cut its revenue guide to $228M. According to Upstart's management, funding constraints arising out of a challenging macroeconomic environment (stagflationary pressures) were hurting its marketplace volumes. After a stable April and May, 2-Yr treasury rates shot up from 2.53% on June 1, 2022 to 3.45% on June 14, 2022. Actual Results: Upstart delivered diluted adjusted earnings of 1 cent per share in Q2 2022, compared favorably with the consensus estimate of a loss of 5 cents per share, with revenues of $228 million up 18% on a year-over-year basis. Revenues were positively impacted by a solid surge in revenue from fees, which was $258 million (113% of total revenues) and up 38% year over year.
